task_completion.description: The managed_portfolio.xml file is opened in Portfolio Performance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Portfolio Performance application window is visible, and the title bar or main tab displays 'managed_portfolio' or 'managed_portfolio.xml'.

task_completion.description: NVIDIA Corp's 10-for-1 stock split on 2024-06-10 is recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Securities', 'Statement of Assets', or 'Events' view for NVIDIA Corp, a stock split event with a ratio of 10 on 2024-06-10 is visible, or the total shares for NVIDIA are shown as 100.

task_completion.description: Allianz SE's dividend on 2024-05-09 is recorded with the correct gross and tax amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Transactions' list or 'Deposit Accounts' view for 'Verrechnungskonto', a Dividend entry for Allianz SE on 2024-05-09 is visible with a Gross amount of 207.00 and Taxes of 54.60.

task_completion.description: The 'Asset Allocation' taxonomy is created with the correct hierarchy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Taxonomies' section, a taxonomy named 'Asset Allocation' exists. It contains a parent category 'Equity' with children 'Growth' and 'Dividend Income', and a parent category 'Fixed Income' with child 'Bonds'.

task_completion.description: Securities are correctly assigned to the taxonomy categories, including the split for Vanguard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Asset Allocation' taxonomy view, NVIDIA is assigned to Growth (100%), Allianz to Dividend Income (100%), iShares Corp Bond to Bonds (100%), and Vanguard FTSE All-World is split between Growth (70%) and Dividend Income (30%).

task_completion.description: The portfolio file is saved after all changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename 'managed_portfolio.xml' in the application title bar or tab does not have an asterisk (*) next to it, indicating there are no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent used the Portfolio Performance GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Portfolio Performance application dialogs and menus, rather than editing the XML file directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show commands like Python scripts, sed, or awk being used to directly modify the managed_portfolio.xml file.

integrity.description: The results are shown within the genuine Portfolio Performance application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches Portfolio Performance, not a mock-up, text file, or copy-pasted text of the expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: NVIDIA stock split: 10-for-1 on 2024-06-10 (post-split shares: 100). Allianz dividend: 2024-05-09, Gross €207.00 (15 shares * €13.80), Tax €54.60 (26.375% of €207.00). Taxonomy 'Asset Allocation' hierarchy: Equity -> Growth, Dividend Income; Fixed Income -> Bonds. Assignments: NVIDIA -> Growth (100%), Allianz -> Dividend Income (100%), iShares Corp Bond -> Bonds (100%), Vanguard FTSE All-World -> Growth (70%) / Dividend Income (30%).
